slides.headline: A solar installer we work with was drowning in enquiries — and losing most of them.
slides.body: Solar's a slow sell. Lots of 'just looking', a few real buyers. Swipe.

slides.headline: By the time he called back, they'd moved on.
slides.body: Booked a survey with whoever replied first. Usually not him — he was up on a roof.

slides.headline: We put a speed-to-lead system on his enquiries.
slides.body: Every one gets an instant reply that answers the basics and books the serious ones for a survey.

slides.headline: The hot leads get booked while they're still warm — not three days later.
He stopped losing high-value installs to whoever rang back first.
slides.body: Same enquiries. Far more surveys in the diary.

slides.headline: Losing big-ticket quotes to slow follow-up?
slides.save: Save this if leads go cold before you reply
